rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §31.024, which governs school district use of rejected instructional materials. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A school district may not adopt or otherwise use instructional material included on the list of rejected instructional materials maintained by the State Board of Education under Section 31.022(a).
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
